assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: Shows .AddBffBlazorClient() chained on the AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect() builder

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Shows builder.Services.AddBffBlazorClient(options => { ... options.Polling = new BffBlazorClientPollingOptions { Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30) } })
